branding.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
branding.longDescription: Edunancial is a membership platform dedicated to improving financial literacy and financial competency through structured learning resources, interactive tools, practical exercises, and technology-supported methods.
branding.publicDisclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.
legal.translationReview: Human legal review recommended before publishing localized legal copy.

aiCoach.description: The Edunancial AI Coach helps members move from financial literacy to practical decision-making with guided prompts, course recommendations, and action-oriented follow-up.

careers.description: We're building a global financial competency platform. As Edunancial grows, opportunities will become available for educators, technologists, designers, translators, AI specialists, and business professionals.

latinAmerica.label: Latin America
latinAmerica.title: Latin America: Structure meets opportunity.
latinAmerica.description: Edunancial Latin America is being built for founders and households across Mexico, Colombia, Peru, Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Ecuador, and all of Central and South America. Every curriculum track — RED, WHITE, and BLUE — will be fully localized in Spanish and Portuguese.
latinAmerica.launchPriority.1: Informality to structure: unlocking capital and protection
latinAmerica.launchPriority.2: Currency risk, political dynamics, and planning discipline
latinAmerica.launchPriority.3: Business formation in Mexico, Colombia, Argentina, and Brazil
latinAmerica.launchPriority.4: Cross-border expansion across Spanish and Portuguese markets
latinAmerica.markets.mexico.detail: North America's gateway to Latin commerce and business culture.
latinAmerica.markets.colombia.detail: Fast-growing startup ecosystem and entrepreneurial energy.
latinAmerica.markets.brazil.detail: Largest economy in Latin America with Portuguese-language content.
latinAmerica.markets.argentina.detail: Resilient entrepreneurship in complex economic conditions.
latinAmerica.markets.peru.detail: Emerging markets, informality transitions, and capital access.
latinAmerica.markets.centralAmerica.deta: Guatemala, Honduras, El Salvador, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panama.
